description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in a buttoned, collared shirt with rolled-up sleeves and fitted trousers secured by a belt. The figure has a well-groomed, short hairstyle and a clean-shaven face, with defined facial features. The shirt is tucked into the pants, and the pants are straight-cut, ending above sturdy, ankle-high boots. The hands are relaxed and positioned at the sides, and the overall build is average and proportional. The figure's posture is upright and natural, suitable for walking or standing in an urban environment. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the clothing style is casual yet neat.
description: A casually dressed adult male figure in a collared shirt, fitted trousers, and boots, standing upright with a natural posture. The figure has short hair and no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the collared shirt, belt, facial features, and both hands relaxed at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the rolled-up sleeve, and the straight cut of the trousers.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the shirt, belt, and the back of the boots, with arms slightly away from the body.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm, and leg alignment.
attribute_clothing_type: casual button-up shirt with rolled sleeves and fitted trousers with a belt
